subcodes.first_line: He Who was hidden hath appeared, He Who was treasured hath emerged, and He Who was promised hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر من کان مکنونا و برز من کان مخزونا و اتی من کان موعودا و الذی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to the people of the world, @suffering and imprisonment
